author: DWC2016
content: This dude low key weird. threw shade / hating on <@801169196015943731>  with disses disguised compliments. “Keep in mind I this is just a replay homie is NOT trading live he’s NOT that Fucking good.. or he would be making $2M a month” “he was making $20 a month when I was making $20000” these be the kinda internet 🐍weirdos you gotta watch out for. rather somebody just straight diss me and be real then try to make it seems like a complement when they clearly trying to lil bro you and diss. Also didn’t tag Jdub I didn’t like that at all 🤷‍♂️

author: DWC2016
content:
<@1333105314018623600> the problem is right after giving a compliment, he says . 

“**Keep in mind I this is just a replay homie is NOT trading live... he’s NOT that Fucking good**..** or he would be making $2M a month” **

 “he was making $20 a month when I was making $20000” 

Very quite literally saying Jack "isnt that good" , or he would be making more money. " saying jack isnt live trading" which isnt true and also implies hes isnt actually making these trades he teachs for real. 

Also directly compares himself to Jack saying he was making more money than Jack when Jack was making only $20 a month. Implying hes better / above Jack.

Thats called back handed compliments and its weird. You should def be careful when people display these kinds of behavior traits its a dark red flag when ppl do this. 

but its the internet so everybody gonna talk part of the game. 🤷‍♂️

author: StevenP
content: the 119 is 1 otm since stock price is 118. 1 otm strikes are a good balance for day traders to take. usually they have a good delta and the cost is decent. so it makes for good profit compared to cost. if you look at 2 otm sometimes the volume and open interest paired with your thesis on thinking the stock will go to $120 from 118 can be more profitable with a strong move towards the strike price. its really all about your risk and thesis on where the stock will go
